description: Apple IIe System Monitor ROM Routines ($F800-$FFFF)
source: Inside the Apple IIe by Gary B. Little - Chapter 3, Tables 3-3, 5-2, 5-12

symbols.name: PRINTYX
symbols.description: Print Y(hi):X(lo) as 4 hex digits

symbols.name: PREAD
symbols.description: Read game paddle (X=paddle#, returns Y=value)

symbols.name: BELL
symbols.description: Sound bell

symbols.name: BASCALC
symbols.description: Calculate video line base address (A=line#)

symbols.name: VTAB
symbols.description: Move cursor to line in CV ($25)

symbols.name: CLREOP
symbols.description: Clear from cursor to end of page

symbols.name: HOME
symbols.description: Clear screen and home cursor

symbols.name: CR
symbols.description: Carriage return (move to next line)

symbols.name: CLREOL
symbols.description: Clear from cursor to end of line

symbols.name: WAIT
symbols.description: Delay 0.5*(26+27*A+5*A*A) microseconds

symbols.name: RDKEY
symbols.description: Read character from input device (via KSW)

symbols.name: KEYIN
symbols.description: Read character from keyboard

symbols.name: RDCHAR
symbols.description: Read character with escape sequence handling

symbols.name: GETLN
symbols.description: Read line from input to buffer at $200

symbols.name: CROUT
symbols.description: Output carriage return character

symbols.name: PRBYTE
symbols.description: Print byte in A as 2 hex digits

symbols.name: PRHEX
symbols.description: Print low nibble of A as hex digit

symbols.name: COUT
symbols.description: Character output to device (via CSW)

symbols.name: COUT1
symbols.description: Character output to video screen

symbols.name: SETKBD
symbols.description: Set keyboard input hook (KSW) to address in A(hi):Y(lo)

symbols.name: SETVID
symbols.description: Set video output hook (CSW) to address in A(hi):Y(lo)

symbols.name: MONITOR
symbols.description: Enter system monitor

symbols.name: MONZ
symbols.description: System monitor cold-start entry point (Ch.3: 'cold-start entry is at $FF59')

symbols.name: WARM
symbols.description: System monitor warm-start entry point (Tables 5-2, 5-12: USER/NMI/IRQ vector = $FF65)

symbols.name: BRKRTN
symbols.description: BRK interrupt handler - displays 6502 registers (Tables 5-2, 5-12: BRK vector = $FA59)
